---
pagetitle: "StudyStats — Service menu & rates"
description: "A rough guide to per-deliverable pricing for statistical consulting. Every project is individually scoped, priced and invoiced."
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
css: styles.css
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .ss-rates{max-width:1080px;margin:0 auto;padding:3rem 1.25rem 1rem}
  .ss-rates h1{font-size:clamp(1.9rem,3.4vw,2.6rem);margin:0 0 .5rem;text-align:center;letter-spacing:-.5px}
  .ss-rates .lead{text-align:center;color:#b8b8b8;max-width:760px;margin:0 auto 1.25rem;font-size:1.05rem;line-height:1.55}
  .ss-rates .currency-note{text-align:center;color:#7a7a7a;font-size:.82rem;margin:0 0 2.25rem}
  .ss-rates h2.ss-cat{font-size:1.25rem;margin:2.25rem 0 .35rem;letter-spacing:-.3px;color:#fff}
  .ss-rates .cat-blurb{color:#9a9a9a;margin:0 0 .9rem;font-size:.92rem}
  table.ss-pricetable{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;background:#1b1b1b;border:1px solid #2a2a2a;border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:.5rem}
  table.ss-pricetable th,table.ss-pricetable td{padding:.78rem 1rem;text-align:left;border-bottom:1px solid #2a2a2a;vertical-align:top}
  table.ss-pricetable th{background:#222;color:#cfcfcf;font-size:.74rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;font-weight:600}
  table.ss-pricetable tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none}
  table.ss-pricetable td.label{font-weight:600;color:#fff;width:30%;white-space:nowrap}
  table.ss-pricetable td.desc{color:#bdbdbd;font-size:.91rem;line-height:1.5}
  table.ss-pricetable td.price{text-align:right;color:#fff;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;width:14%;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}
  .ss-callout{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1b1b1b,#2a2a2a);border-radius:12px;padding:1.6rem 1.5rem;margin:2rem 0;border:1px solid #2a2a2a}
  .ss-callout h3{margin:0 0 .5rem;font-size:1.05rem}
  .ss-callout p{color:#cfcfcf;margin:0;line-height:1.55;font-size:.94rem}
  .ss-disclaimer{background:#1b1b1b;border:1px solid #4a4a4a;border-left:3px solid #fff;border-radius:8px;padding:1rem 1.25rem;margin:2.25rem 0 0;color:#cfcfcf;font-size:.92rem;line-height:1.55}
  .ss-disclaimer strong{color:#fff}
  .ss-faq{margin:2.5rem 0 4rem}
  .ss-faq details{background:#1b1b1b;border:1px solid #2a2a2a;border-radius:8px;padding:.95rem 1.25rem;margin-bottom:.55rem}
  .ss-faq summary{cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;color:#fff;font-size:.96rem;list-style:none}
  .ss-faq summary::-webkit-details-marker{display:none}
  .ss-faq summary::before{content:"+";display:inline-block;width:1.1rem;color:#9a9a9a;font-weight:700}
  .ss-faq details[open] summary::before{content:"–"}
  .ss-faq details[open] summary{margin-bottom:.55rem}
  .ss-faq details p{color:#bdbdbd;margin:0;line-height:1.55;font-size:.92rem;padding-left:1.1rem}
  .ss-cta-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.75rem;justify-content:center;margin-top:1rem}
  .ss-btn{display:inline-block;padding:.85rem 1.6rem;border-radius:6px;font-weight:600;font-size:1rem;text-decoration:none!important;border:1.5px solid transparent;transition:transform .08s,box-shadow .15s,background .15s}
  .ss-btn-primary{background:#fff;color:#121212!important}
  .ss-btn-primary:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(255,255,255,.12)}
  .ss-btn-secondary{background:transparent;color:#fff!important;border-color:#fff}
  .ss-btn-secondary:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.08)}
  .ss-final{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1b1b1b,#2a2a2a);border:1px solid #2a2a2a;border-radius:14px;padding:2.5rem 1.5rem;text-align:center;margin:3rem auto 5rem;max-width:900px}
  .ss-final h2{margin:0 0 .5rem}
  .ss-final p{color:#cfcfcf;max-width:600px;margin:0 auto 1.25rem}
</style>
```

::: {.ss-rates}

# Service menu &amp; indicative pricing

::: {.lead}
A short menu of typical engagements. It's deliberately brief — most projects mix and match items from more than one tier, and the exact scope is settled on the discovery call. Use this to anchor what your project might cost; we send a fully itemised quote afterwards.
:::

<p class="currency-note">All prices in <strong>ZAR</strong>, exclusive of VAT. Indicative only. Projects start from <strong>R5&nbsp;000</strong>.</p>

<h2 class="ss-cat">Quick-turn analysis <span style="color:#9a9a9a;font-weight:400;font-size:.85rem;">— from R5&nbsp;000</span></h2>
<p class="cat-blurb">A focused piece of work, typically returned in under a week.</p>

<table class="ss-pricetable">
<thead><tr><th>Item</th><th>Typical scope</th><th style="text-align:right;">From</th></tr></thead>
<tbody>
<tr><td class="label">Sample-size &amp; protocol stats</td><td class="desc">Sample size, statistical analysis plan, methods paragraph for your protocol or ethics submission.</td><td class="price">R5&nbsp;000</td></tr>
<tr><td class="label">Descriptive analysis package</td><td class="desc">Table 1, two or three figures, brief results paragraph. One clean dataset.</td><td class="price">R5&nbsp;000</td></tr>
<tr><td class="label">Single-model analysis</td><td class="desc">One regression model (linear / logistic / Cox / Poisson) with diagnostics and a short results write-up.</td><td class="price">R6&nbsp;000</td></tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<h2 class="ss-cat">Full study analysis <span style="color:#9a9a9a;font-weight:400;font-size:.85rem;">— from R12&nbsp;000</span></h2>
<p class="cat-blurb">End-to-end statistical work for a manuscript, thesis chapter or report.</p>

<table class="ss-pricetable">
<thead><tr><th>Item</th><th>Typical scope</th><th style="text-align:right;">From</th></tr></thead>
<tbody>
<tr><td class="label">Manuscript-ready analysis</td><td class="desc">Cleaning, descriptives, adjusted models, sensitivity analyses, methods + results sections, tables and figures ready for submission.</td><td class="price">R12&nbsp;000</td></tr>
<tr><td class="label">Diagnostic accuracy study</td><td class="desc">Sensitivity, specificity, PPV/NPV, ROC/AUC (with comparison), calibration, full write-up.</td><td class="price">R12&nbsp;000</td></tr>
<tr><td class="label">MMed / MSc thesis support</td><td class="desc">Aims rewrite, analysis plan, all tables and figures, methods + results chapters, two rounds of revision.</td><td class="price">R18&nbsp;000</td></tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<h2 class="ss-cat">Bespoke &amp; ongoing <span style="color:#9a9a9a;font-weight:400;font-size:.85rem;">— quoted on scope</span></h2>
<p class="cat-blurb">Larger or recurring work where a flat package doesn't fit.</p>

<table class="ss-pricetable">
<thead><tr><th>Item</th><th>Typical scope</th><th style="text-align:right;">From</th></tr></thead>
<tbody>
<tr><td class="label">Prediction / risk model</td><td class="desc">Model development, internal validation, decision-curve analysis, reporting (TRIPOD).</td><td class="price">R20&nbsp;000</td></tr>
<tr><td class="label">Reviewer-response package</td><td class="desc">Re-analysis, additional models or sensitivity work, point-by-point statistical response to reviewers.</td><td class="price">R6&nbsp;000</td></tr>
<tr><td class="label">Retainer / department support</td><td class="desc">Block of hours per month for a research unit or supervisor. Priority turnaround.</td><td class="price">on request</td></tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<div class="ss-disclaimer">
<strong>This is a menu, not a price list.</strong> Each project is individually scoped on a free 15-minute call and you receive a written, itemised quote before any work starts. The price on your quote is what you pay — no hourly surprises.
</div>

<div class="ss-callout">
<h3>Revisions &amp; ad-hoc work</h3>
<p>One round of revisions per deliverable is included (within 14 days of delivery). Further revisions, supervisor changes and reviewer responses are billed in <strong>30-minute blocks at R500</strong>, tracked transparently.</p>
</div>

<div class="ss-callout">
<h3>Payment terms</h3>
<p><strong>50% deposit</strong> secures your project start; the balance is due on delivery. Quotes valid for 30 days. EFT and PayFast accepted; tax invoice issued on payment. Purchase-order-compliant invoicing available for South African universities.</p>
</div>

## Common questions

::: {.ss-faq}

<details><summary>Why per-deliverable instead of hourly?</summary><p>Per-deliverable pricing maps directly to what you and your supervisor already think in — "Table 1, Table 2, regression model, methods section". You see exactly what you're paying for and there are no hourly surprises if a model takes longer to run.</p></details>

<details><summary>What if my data needs more cleaning than expected?</summary><p>The cleaning fee is set during the scoping call once we've seen the data. If reality differs from what we agreed, we re-quote <em>before</em> doing the extra work — never after.</p></details>

<details><summary>Can I buy just one or two items?</summary><p>Yes — many clients only need a sample-size calculation or a single analysis. Minimum project value is <strong>R5&nbsp;000</strong>; anything smaller is usually better handled as part of a wider engagement.</p></details>

<details><summary>Do you charge for the discovery call?</summary><p>No. The first 15-minute call is free. If you need a deeper working session before committing, that can be booked as a paid scoping consult — and the fee is credited to your project if you proceed within 30 days.</p></details>

<details><summary>Can my institution pay directly?</summary><p>Yes. We can issue purchase-order-compliant invoices and tax invoices on request, and are already onboarded with several South African universities.</p></details>

:::

:::

::: {.ss-final}
## Ready to scope your project?
Bring your research question and your deadline — we'll send back an itemised quote drawn from this menu, tailored to what you actually need.

::: {.ss-cta-row}
<a href="contact.qmd" class="ss-btn ss-btn-primary">Book a free 15-min consult →</a>
<a href="how_it_works.qmd" class="ss-btn ss-btn-secondary">See how it works</a>
:::
:::
